/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/core/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/core/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/file/envfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/file/importer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/crypto/encrypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/schema/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/cli/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/set.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/unset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/use.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/profiles.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/diff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/import_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/export_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/history_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/validate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/mask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/watch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/sync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/tui_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/commands/info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/envctl.dir/src/tui/tui.cpp.o -o envctl  -lsqlite3 -lncursesw /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lstdc++fs
